description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/davidhsianturi/laravel-test-deploy:latest with a mysql:5.7 service and define the variables DB_HOST, DB_USERNAME, MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a unit_test job that runs composer install, cp .env.example .env, php artisan key:generate, php artisan migrate, and vendor/bin/phpunit. In the deploy stage add a deploy_production job that runs only on the master branch, is manual, sets up ssh-agent (installing openssh-client if missing), adds the $SPK_GCL secret, creates ~/.ssh/config to disable StrictHostKeyChecking when inside Docker, and executes ~/.composer/vendor/bin/envoy run deploy, while declaring the production environment with URL http://35.198.233.156.
